violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Box of food on the floor of the walk in freezer.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Starting to stain the walls where the air fryers are used.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Fans in the walk in cooler are dusty.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Hot dog trays are not inverted on the shelf for customer use.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items . -WD-40 and other chemicals on a shelf above the 3 comp sink.--Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. -Water bottles with chemicals in them are not labeled.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
